✦ A Digital Vector Adventure ✦

MineCraft

The Rise of the Goh's

Welcome to Goh City — skyscrapers, seaside, parks and open country to explore. Stack blocks, snap together code, and bring your ideas to life. 🌆

🏙️ Explore the city 🧩 Build with blocks ✈️ Seaside & airport 🌳 Parks & waterfalls 🚗 A world that's alive

Quick startHow to Play

You are a Forger — part builder, part coder. Click the world to lock your mouse, then look around and build. The real magic is the Forge Console: write Python to place hundreds of blocks at once.

MoveWASD
Jump / fly upSpace
Fly down (or look down + W)Shift
SprintCtrl
Mine blockLeft click
Place blockRight click
Pick blockMiddle click
Select block1–9 / scroll
Open block inventoryE
Toggle flyF
Forge ConsoleC
Quest logQ
This helpH
Pause / releaseEsc
FIRST CODE TO TRY
x, y, z = mc.player.getPos()
for i in range(10):
    mc.setBlock(x + i, y, z, GOLD)

Campaign · VoxeliaQuest Log

Python · mcpiCode Reference

WorldsShare / Save

Save your world to a file (best for big builds), or use a code to copy-paste. Load a friend's file/code to play in the exact same world. Your build also auto-saves to this browser.

☁Cloud save (Supabase)

Share your World ID and anyone can load your world from the cloud. (One-time setup of a worlds table is needed in the Supabase project — see the read-me.)

Live "join my world online" play needs a small server you host yourself — see the note in the read-me. Same-device split-screen co-op works now via multiple browser tabs.
